person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Sir knight Robert HOO II (1114-1166) Lord of Luton & Rosamond CHIVERON (1146-1191)

Robert was born in Litcham, Mitford, County Norfolk, England and died on August 1, 1166 in Ampthill, County Bedfordshire, England. Rosamond was born in 1146 and died on July 23, 1191 in Luton Hoo, County Bedfordshire, England.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rosamond de Chiveron於大約1146年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾盧頓 胡時，她的父親Thomas de Chiveron28歲，母親Mrs Thomas Chiveron22歲。她於1163年與Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II在英國貝德福爾盧頓 胡結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1191年7月24日在她的家鄉享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chiveron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire): habitational name from Chiverstone Farm in Kenton (Devon) or from Chivelstone (Devon).

variants.name: Rosamund
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hros ‘horse’ + mund ‘protection’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the later Middle Ages it was reanalysed by folk etymology as if from Latin rosa munda ‘pure rose’ or rosa mundi ‘rose of the world’, titles given to the Virgin Mary. The spelling Rosamond has been common since the Middle Ages, when scribes used o for u, to distinguish it from n and m, all of which consisted of very similar downstrokes of the pen. ‘Fair Rosamond’ ( Rosamond Clifford ) was a legendary beauty who lived at Woodstock in Oxfordshire in the 12th century. She is said to have been the mistress of King Henry II , and to have been murdered by the queen, Eleanor of Aquitaine , in 1176 .

en.lifeSummary: When Rosamond de Chiveron was born about 1146, in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Chiveron, was 28 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Chiveron, was 22. She married Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II in 1163, in Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 24 July 1191, in her hometown, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rosamond de Chiveron est née environ 1146, à Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Chiveron, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Chiveron, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II en 1163, à Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 juillet 1191, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rosamond de Chiveron è nata il circa 1146 nel Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Chiveron, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs Thomas Chiveron, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II nel 1163, nel Luton Hoo, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 24 luglio 1191, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rosamond de Chiveronが約1146年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトン ホーオで生まれた時，父Thomas de Chiveronは28歳，母Mrs Thomas Chiveronは22歳であった。1163年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアルトン ホーオでSir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1191年7月24日に故郷で46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rosamond de Chiveron(이)가 대략 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 루턴 후에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Chiveron(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Chiveron(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1163년 영국 베드퍼드실르 루턴 후에서 Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 7월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rosamond de Chiveron родилась около 1146 г. в местности лутон ху, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Chiveron было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Chiveron, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight Robert Hoo, Lord of Luton II в 1163 г. в местности лутон ху, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 24 июля 1191 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет.
